mapper.sql: select stk.id, stk.bill_no, stk.ref_bill_no, stk.suppler_id stkSupplierId, stk.bill_date, stk.warehouse_id, stk.department_id, stk.bill_status, stk.user_id stk_user_id, stk.bill_type, stk.del_flag, stk.tenant_id, stk.delete_by, stk.delete_time, stk.settlement_type, stk.audit_date, stk.create_by, stk.create_time, stk.update_by, stk.update_time, stk.remark,stk.del_person,stk.telephone,stk.total_amount,stk.invoice_number,stk.invoice_amount, stk.invoice_time,stk.pro_person,stk.return_reason,stk.is_month_init,stk.receipt_confirm_status,stk.audit_by, s.id sId,s.code supplierCode,s.name supplierName, d.id dId,d.code departmentCode,d.name departmentName, w.id wId,w.code warehouseCode,w.name warehouseName, tw.id twId,tw.code toWarehouseCode,tw.name toWarehouseName, u.user_id userId,u.nick_name nickName,u.user_name userName, au.nick_name auditNickName,au.user_name auditUserName, cu.nick_name createrNickName,cu.user_name createrUserName, uu.nick_name updateByNickName,uu.user_name updateByUserName from stk_io_bill stk left join fd_supplier s on stk.suppler_id = s.id left join fd_department d on stk.department_id = d.id left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_warehouse tw on stk.department_id = tw.id and stk.bill_type = 501 left join sys_user u on stk.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_user au on stk.audit_by = au.user_id left join sys_user cu on stk.create_by = cu.user_id left join sys_user uu on stk.update_by = uu.user_id

select sum(stk.total_amount) totalAmt, sum(case when stk.bill_type in (101) then stk.total_amount else 0 end) totalRkAmt, sum(case when stk.bill_type in (201) then stk.total_amount else 0 end) totalCkAmt, sum(case when stk.bill_type in (301) then stk.total_amount else 0 end) totalTkAmt, sum(case when stk.bill_type in (401) then stk.total_amount else 0 end) totalThAmt from stk_io_bill stk left join fd_supplier s on stk.suppler_id = s.id left join fd_department d on stk.department_id = d.id left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join sys_user u on stk.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_user au on stk.audit_by = au.user_id left join sys_user cu on stk.create_by = cu.user_id
mapper.select: select stk.department_id as departmentId, d.name as departmentName, ifnull(sum(stk.total_amount), 0) as outboundAmount, ifnull(sum(e.qty), 0) as outboundQuantity from stk_io_bill stk left join fd_department d on stk.department_id = d.id left join stk_io_bill_entry e on e.paren_id = stk.id and (e.del_flag is null or e.del_flag != 1) where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type = 201 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.department_id is not null group by stk.department_id, d.name order by outboundAmount desc

select stk.id,m.code materialCode,m.name materialName, stk.bill_type billType, sum(b.qty) materialQty, b.price unitPrice,ROUND(sum(b.qty) * b.price, 2) materialAmt, m.speci materialSpeci,m.model materialModel,u.unit_name unitName, f.factory_name factoryName,s.name supplierName, w.name warehouseName,b.material_id materialId from stk_io_bill stk left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id left join fd_supplier s on stk.suppler_id = s.id left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_factory f on f.factory_id = m.factory_id left join fd_unit u on u.unit_id = m.unit_id where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (101,301) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_no like concat('%', #{billNo}, '%') and stk.suppler_id = #{supplerId} and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
and stk.bill_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.bill_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY stk.id,m.code,m.name, stk.bill_type, b.price, m.speci,m.model,u.unit_name, f.factory_name,s.name, w.name,b.material_id

select stk.id, m.code materialCode, m.name materialName, stk.bill_type billType, sum(b.qty) materialQty, b.unit_price unitPrice, ROUND(sum(b.qty) * b.unit_price, 2) materialAmt, m.speci materialSpeci, m.model materialModel, u.unit_name unitName, f.factory_name factoryName, s.name supplierName, fc.finance_category_name financeCategoryName, d.name departmentName, w.name warehouseName, b.material_id materialId, m.register_no materialRegisterNo, m.package_speci materialPackageSpeci, m.is_way materialIsWay, wc.warehouse_category_name materialWarehouseCategoryName, stk.create_time createTime, cu.nick_name createrNickName, cu.user_name createrUserName, stk.audit_date auditDate, au.nick_name auditNickName, au.user_name auditUserName from stk_io_bill stk left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) left join fd_supplier s on stk.suppler_id = s.id left join fd_department d on stk.department_id = d.id left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_warehouse_category wc on m.storeroom_id = wc.warehouse_category_id left join fd_factory f on f.factory_id = m.factory_id left join fd_unit u on u.unit_id = m.unit_id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join sys_user cu on stk.create_by = cu.user_id left join sys_user au on stk.audit_by = au.user_id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (201,401) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_no like concat('%', #{billNo}, '%') and stk.department_id = #{departmentId} and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and stk.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.audit_date <= #{endDate} and (m.name like concat('%', #{materialNameLike}, '%') or m.code like concat('%', #{materialNameLike}, '%') or m.referred_name like concat('%', #{materialNameLike}, '%')) and m.speci like concat('%', #{materialSpeciLike}, '%') and m.model like concat('%', #{materialModelLike}, '%') GROUP BY stk.id, m.code, m.name, stk.bill_type, b.unit_price, m.speci, m.model, u.unit_name, f.factory_name, s.name, fc.finance_category_name, d.name, w.name, b.material_id, m.register_no, m.package_speci, m.is_way, wc.warehouse_category_name, stk.create_time, cu.nick_name, cu.user_name, stk.audit_date, au.nick_name, au.user_name

select SUM(IFNULL(b.qty,0)) totalQty,SUM(IFNULL(b.qty,0) * IFNULL(b.unit_price,0)) totalAmt from stk_io_bill stk left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) left join fd_supplier s on stk.suppler_id = s.id left join fd_department d on stk.department_id = d.id left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (201,401) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_no like concat('%', #{billNo}, '%') and stk.department_id = #{departmentId} and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and stk.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.audit_date <= #{endDate} and (m.name like concat('%', #{materialNameLike}, '%') or m.code like concat('%', #{materialNameLike}, '%') or m.referred_name like concat('%', #{materialNameLike}, '%')) and m.speci like concat('%', #{materialSpeciLike}, '%') and m.model like concat('%', #{materialModelLike}, '%')

select a.id, a.bill_no, a.ref_bill_no, a.suppler_id, a.bill_date, a.warehouse_id, a.department_id, a.bill_status, a.user_id as stk_user_id, a.bill_type, a.del_flag, a.tenant_id, a.delete_by, a.delete_time, a.settlement_type, a.audit_date, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, a.del_person,a.telephone,a.total_amount,a.invoice_number,a.invoice_amount, a.invoice_time,a.pro_person,a.return_reason,a.is_month_init,a.receipt_confirm_status,a.audit_by, b.id as sub_id, b.paren_id as sub_paren_id, b.bill_no as sub_bill_no, b.commodity_id as sub_commodity_id, b.material_id as sub_material_id, b.material_name as sub_entry_material_name, b.material_speci as sub_entry_material_speci, b.material_model as sub_entry_material_model, b.material_factory_id as sub_entry_material_factory_id, b.unit_price as sub_unit_price, b.qty as sub_qty, b.price as sub_price, b.amt as sub_amt, b.batch_no as sub_batch_no, b.batch_number as sub_batch_number, b.begin_time as sub_begin_time, b.end_time as sub_end_time, b.del_flag as sub_del_flag, b.tenant_id as sub_tenant_id, b.delete_by as sub_delete_by, b.delete_time as sub_delete_time, b.remark as sub_remark, b.kc_no as sub_kc_no, b.warehouse_id as sub_warehouse_id, b.main_barcode as sub_main_barcode, b.sub_barcode as sub_sub_barcode, b.suppler_id as sub_suppler_id, b.settlement_type as sub_settlement_type, au.nick_name auditNickName,au.user_name auditUserName, cu.nick_name createrNickName,cu.user_name createrUserName,a.audit_by, wh.id as wId, wh.code as warehouseCode, wh.name as warehouseName, d.id as dId, d.code as departmentCode, d.name as departmentName, op.user_id as userId, op.nick_name as nickName, op.user_name as userName, bill_sup.id as sId, bill_sup.code as supplierCode, bill_sup.name as supplierName, m.id as mId, m.code as materialCode, m.name as materialName, m.speci, m.model, m.register_no, m.supplier_id, m.factory_id AS mat_factory_id, m.unit_id AS m_unit_id, m.finance_category_id, m.storeroom_id, u.unit_id AS u_unit_id, u.unit_code as u_code, u.unit_name as u_name, f.factory_id AS f_factory_id, f.factory_code as f_code, f.factory_name as f_name, wc.warehouse_category_id as wid, wc.warehouse_category_code as wc_code, wc.warehouse_category_name as wc_name, fc.finance_category_id, fc.finance_category_code as fc_code, fc.finance_category_name as fc_name, s.id as sid, s.code as supplier_code, s.name as supplier_name from stk_io_bill a left join fd_warehouse wh on a.warehouse_id = wh.id left join fd_department d on a.department_id = d.id left join fd_supplier bill_sup on a.suppler_id = bill_sup.id left join sys_user op on a.user_id = op.user_id left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = a.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_unit u on m.unit_id = u.unit_id left join fd_factory f on m.factory_id = f.factory_id left join fd_warehouse_category wc on m.storeroom_id = wc.warehouse_category_id left join fd_finance_category fc on m.finance_category_id = fc.finance_category_id left join fd_supplier s on m.supplier_id = s.id left join sys_user au on a.audit_by = au.user_id left join sys_user cu on a.create_by = cu.user_id where a.id = #{id} and a.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.insert:
insert into stk_io_bill
bill_no, ref_bill_no, suppler_id, bill_date, warehouse_id, department_id, bill_status, user_id, bill_type, del_flag, audit_date, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_person, telephone, total_amount, invoice_number, invoice_amount, invoice_time, pro_person, return_reason, is_month_init, receipt_confirm_status, audit_by, tenant_id, settlement_type,
#{billNo}, #{refBillNo}, #{supplerId}, #{billDate}, #{warehouseId}, #{departmentId}, #{billStatus}, #{userId}, #{billType}, #{delFlag}, #{auditDate}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delPerson}, #{telephone}, #{totalAmount}, #{invoiceNumber}, #{invoiceAmount}, #{invoiceTime}, #{proPerson}, #{returnReason}, #{isMonthInit}, #{receiptConfirmStatus}, #{auditBy}, #{scopedTenantId}, #{settlementType},
mapper.update:
update stk_io_bill_entry set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = #{deleteTime} where tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and paren_id in
#{parenId}
update stk_io_bill_entry set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = #{deleteTime} where paren_id = #{parenId} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.insert:
insert into stk_io_bill_entry(paren_id, bill_no, commodity_id, material_id, material_name, material_speci, material_model, material_factory_id, unit_price, qty, price, amt, batch_no, batch_number, begin_time, end_time, del_flag, remark, kc_no, warehouse_id, main_barcode, sub_barcode, suppler_id, settlement_type, tenant_id) values
(#{item.parenId}, #{item.billNo}, #{item.commodityId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.materialSpeci}, #{item.materialModel}, #{item.materialFactoryId}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.qty}, #{item.price}, #{item.amt}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.batchNumber}, #{item.beginTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.remark}, #{item.kcNo}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.mainBarcode}, #{item.subBarcode}, #{item.supplerId}, #{item.settlementType}, #{scopedTenantId})
mapper.update: update stk_io_bill_entry set kc_no = #{kcNo} where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.select: select max(bill_no) from stk_io_bill where bill_no like concat('%',#{billNo},'%') and bill_type = 101 and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
select max(bill_no) from stk_io_bill where bill_no like concat('%',#{billNo},'%') and bill_type = 201 and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
select max(bill_no) from stk_io_bill where bill_no like concat('%',#{billNo},'%') and bill_type = 301 and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
select max(bill_no) from stk_io_bill where bill_no like concat('%',#{billNo},'%') and bill_type = 401 and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
select max(bill_no) from stk_io_bill where bill_no like concat('%',#{billNo},'%') and bill_type = 501 and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

select m.name materialName,sum(b.qty) historyQty from stk_io_bill a left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = a.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id where a.bill_status = 2 and a.bill_type = '101' and a.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and a.create_time like concat('%',#{previousDateString},'%') GROUP BY m.name

select wCategoryName,sum(initAmount) initAmount,sum(beginAmount) beginAmount,sum(endAmount) endAmount, sum(beginAmount) - sum(endAmount) settleAmount, sum(profitAmount) profitAmount,sum(loseAmount) loseAmount, sum(initAmount)+sum(beginAmount)- sum(endAmount) settleRealityAmount from ( select wCategoryName, case when alias = '进项' then totalAmount else 0 end beginAmount, case when alias = '出项' then totalAmount else 0 end endAmount, case when alias = '盘盈' then totalAmount else 0 end profitAmount, case when alias = '盘亏' then totalAmount else 0 end loseAmount, case when alias = '期初' then totalAmount else 0 end initAmount from ( select fw.warehouse_category_name wCategoryName, sum(b.amt) totalAmount,'进项' as alias from stk_io_bill stk left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join fd_warehouse_category fw on fw.warehouse_category_id = m.storeroom_id where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_type in (101) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.bill_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY fw.warehouse_category_name union select fw.warehouse_category_name wCategoryName, sum(b.amt) totalAmount,'出项' as alias from stk_io_bill stk left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join fd_warehouse_category fw on fw.warehouse_category_id = m.storeroom_id where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_type in (201) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.bill_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY fw.warehouse_category_name union select fw.warehouse_category_name wCategoryName, sum(b.amt) totalAmount,'盘盈' as alias from stk_io_stocktaking a left join stk_io_stocktaking_entry b on b.paren_id = a.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join fd_warehouse_category fw on fw.warehouse_category_id = m.storeroom_id where a.del_flag != 1 and a.stock_status = 2 and a.stock_type in (502) and a.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and a.stock_date >= #{beginDate} and a.stock_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY fw.warehouse_category_name union select fw.warehouse_category_name wCategoryName, sum(b.amt) totalAmount,'盘亏' as alias from stk_io_stocktaking a left join stk_io_stocktaking_entry b on b.paren_id = a.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join fd_warehouse_category fw on fw.warehouse_category_id = m.storeroom_id where a.del_flag != 1 and a.stock_status = 2 and a.stock_type in (502) and a.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and a.stock_date >= #{beginDate} and a.stock_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY fw.warehouse_category_name union select DISTINCT wCategoryName,sum(totalAmount) totalAmount,'期初' as alias from ( select fw.warehouse_category_name wCategoryName, sum(b.amt) totalAmount from stk_io_bill stk left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join fd_warehouse_category fw on fw.warehouse_category_id = m.storeroom_id where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_type in (101,401) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.bill_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY fw.warehouse_category_name union select fw.warehouse_category_name wCategoryName, sum(b.stock_amount) totalAmount from stk_io_stocktaking a left join stk_io_stocktaking_entry b on b.paren_id = a.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join fd_warehouse_category fw on fw.warehouse_category_id = m.storeroom_id where a.del_flag != 1 and a.stock_status = 2 and a.stock_type in (502) and a.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and a.stock_date >= #{beginDate} and a.stock_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY fw.warehouse_category_name ) qc where 1=1 GROUP BY wCategoryName ) wt ) t where 1=1 GROUP BY wCategoryName
select * from stk_io_bill where bill_date >= #{beginDate} and bill_date <= #{endDate} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

select b.id as sub_id, b.paren_id as sub_paren_id, b.bill_no as sub_bill_no, b.commodity_id as sub_commodity_id, b.material_id as sub_material_id, b.material_name as sub_entry_material_name, b.material_speci as sub_entry_material_speci, b.material_model as sub_entry_material_model, b.material_factory_id as sub_entry_material_factory_id, b.unit_price as sub_unit_price, b.qty as sub_qty, b.price as sub_price, b.amt as sub_amt, b.batch_no as sub_batch_no, b.batch_number as sub_batch_number, b.begin_time as sub_begin_time, b.end_time as sub_end_time, b.del_flag as sub_del_flag, b.remark as sub_remark, b.kc_no as sub_kc_no, b.main_barcode as sub_main_barcode, b.sub_barcode as sub_sub_barcode, b.suppler_id as sub_suppler_id, m.id as mId, m.code as materialCode, m.name as materialName, m.speci, m.model, m.supplier_id, m.storeroom_id, m.factory_id, m.unit_id, m.finance_category_id, m.package_speci, m.register_no, u.unit_id, u.unit_code as u_code, u.unit_name as u_name, f.factory_id, f.factory_code as f_code, f.factory_name as f_name, fc.finance_category_id, fc.finance_category_code as fc_code, fc.finance_category_name as fc_name, wc.warehouse_category_id as wid, wc.warehouse_category_code as wc_code, wc.warehouse_category_name as wc_name, s.id as sid, s.code as supplier_code, s.name as supplier_name, w.id as wId, w.name as warehouseName, w.settlement_type as settlementType from stk_io_bill stk left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and b.del_flag != 1 left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_unit u on u.unit_id = m.unit_id left join fd_factory f on f.factory_id = m.factory_id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join fd_warehouse_category wc on wc.warehouse_category_id = m.storeroom_id left join fd_supplier s on s.id = m.supplier_id where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_status = 2 and m.supplier_id = #{supplerId} and DATE(stk.audit_date) >= DATE(#{beginDate}) and DATE(stk.audit_date) <= DATE(#{endDate})
and ( (w.settlement_type = '1' and stk.bill_type = 101) or (w.settlement_type = '2' and stk.bill_type = 201) or (w.settlement_type = '3' and stk.bill_type = 201) or (w.settlement_type IS NULL and (stk.bill_type = 101 or stk.bill_type = 201)) )
and not exists ( select 1 from stk_io_bill settlement left join stk_io_bill_entry settlement_entry on settlement_entry.paren_id = settlement.id and settlement_entry.del_flag != 1 where settlement.del_flag != 1 and settlement.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and settlement.bill_type = 501 and settlement_entry.material_id = b.material_id and settlement_entry.batch_no = b.batch_no and settlement.bill_status = 2 ) order by stk.audit_date desc, stk.id desc, b.id desc

SELECT stk.id, stk.bill_no billNo, stk.bill_date billDate, stk.warehouse_id warehouseId, stk.department_id departmentId, m.code materialCode, m.name materialName, m.speci materialSpeci, m.model materialModel, u.unit_name unitName, b.qty, b.unit_price unitPrice, b.amt, b.batch_no batchNo, b.batch_number batchNumber, b.begin_time beginTime, b.end_time endTime, w.name warehouseName, d.name departmentName, cu.user_name createrName, cu.nick_name createrNickName, au.user_name auditPersonName, au.nick_name auditNickName, stk.audit_date auditDate, f.factory_name factoryName, s.name supplierName FROM stk_io_bill stk LEFT JOIN stk_io_bill_entry b ON b.paren_id = stk.id AND b.del_flag != 1 LEFT JOIN fd_material m ON b.material_id = m.id LEFT JOIN fd_department d ON stk.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN fd_warehouse w ON stk.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN fd_unit u ON m.unit_id = u.unit_id LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON stk.create_by = cu.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user au ON stk.audit_by = au.user_id LEFT JOIN fd_factory f ON m.factory_id = f.factory_id LEFT JOIN fd_supplier s ON m.supplier_id = s.id WHERE stk.del_flag != 1 AND stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} AND stk.bill_status = 2 AND stk.bill_type = 201 AND stk.bill_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{billNo}, '%') AND stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND stk.department_id = #{departmentId} AND m.id = #{materialId} AND (m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialName}, '%') OR m.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialName}, '%')) AND b.batch_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{batchNo}, '%') AND stk.bill_date >= #{beginDate} AND stk.bill_date <= #{endDate} ORDER BY stk.bill_date DESC, stk.id DESC, b.id DESC

SELECT m.id materialId, m.code materialCode, m.name materialName, m.speci materialSpeci, m.model materialModel, u.unit_name unitName, AVG(b.unit_price) unitPrice, SUM(b.qty) totalQty, SUM(b.amt) totalAmt, NULL as isBilling, m.register_no registerNo, m.period_date periodDate, w.name warehouseName, f.factory_name factoryName, s.name supplierName FROM stk_io_bill stk LEFT JOIN stk_io_bill_entry b ON b.paren_id = stk.id AND b.del_flag != 1 LEFT JOIN fd_material m ON b.material_id = m.id LEFT JOIN fd_warehouse w ON stk.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN fd_unit u ON m.unit_id = u.unit_id LEFT JOIN fd_factory f ON m.factory_id = f.factory_id LEFT JOIN fd_supplier s ON m.supplier_id = s.id WHERE stk.del_flag != 1 AND stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} AND stk.bill_status = 2 AND stk.bill_type = 201 AND stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND stk.department_id = #{departmentId} AND m.id = #{materialId} AND (m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialName}, '%') OR m.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialName}, '%')) AND stk.bill_date >= #{beginDate} AND stk.bill_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY m.id, m.code, m.name, m.speci, m.model, u.unit_name, m.register_no, m.period_date, w.name, f.factory_name, s.name ORDER BY totalAmt DESC

SELECT vsadj.warehouse_id ,vsadj.warehouse_code ,vsadj.warehouse_name ,vsadj.storeroom_id ,vsadj.warehouse_category_code ,vsadj.warehouse_category_name ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date < #{beginDate} then vsadj.jc_qty else 0 end) as qc_qty ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date < #{beginDate} then vsadj.jc_amt else 0 end) as qc_amt ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('RK') then vsadj.io_qty else 0 end) as rk_qty ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('RK') then vsadj.io_amt else 0 end) as rk_amt ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('CK') then vsadj.io_qty else 0 end) as ck_qty ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('CK') then vsadj.io_amt else 0 end) as ck_amt ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('DBR') then vsadj.io_qty else 0 end) as dbr_qty ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('DBR') then vsadj.io_amt else 0 end) as dbr_amt ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('DBC') then vsadj.io_qty else 0 end) as dbc_qty ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('DBC') then vsadj.io_amt else 0 end) as dbc_amt ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('PD') then vsadj.io_qty else 0 end) as pd_qty ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('PD') then vsadj.io_amt else 0 end) as pd_amt ,sum(vsadj.jc_qty) as jc_qty ,sum(vsadj.jc_amt) as jc_amt FROM view_stock_all_detail_jxc vsadj WHERE 1 = 1 and vsadj.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and vsadj.audit_date <= #{endDate} AND vsadj.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND vsadj.storeroom_id = #{warehouseCategoryId} GROUP BY vsadj.warehouse_id ,vsadj.warehouse_code ,vsadj.warehouse_name ,vsadj.storeroom_id ,vsadj.warehouse_category_code ,vsadj.warehouse_category_name

select s.id as supplierId, s.code as supplierCode, s.name as supplierName, count(1) as recordCount from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry e on e.paren_id = stk.id and e.del_flag != 1 left join fd_supplier s on s.id = stk.suppler_id where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_type = 101 and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and e.material_id = #{materialId} group by s.id, s.code, s.name order by s.code asc, s.name asc

select stk.id as billId, stk.bill_no as billNo, w.code as warehouseCode, w.name as warehouseName, s.code as supplierCode, s.name as supplierName, cu.nick_name as creator, stk.create_time as createTime, au.nick_name as auditor, stk.audit_date as auditTime, e.qty as qty, e.unit_price as unitPrice, e.amt as amt, e.batch_no as batchNo, e.end_time as endTime, e.batch_number as batchNumber from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry e on e.paren_id = stk.id and e.del_flag != 1 left join fd_warehouse w on w.id = stk.warehouse_id left join fd_supplier s on s.id = stk.suppler_id left join sys_user cu on cu.user_id = stk.create_by left join sys_user au on au.user_id = stk.audit_by where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_type = 101 and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and e.material_id = #{materialId}
and stk.suppler_id = #{supplierId}
order by
s.code asc, stk.audit_date asc, stk.id asc, e.id asc
s.code asc, stk.audit_date desc, stk.id desc, e.id desc
stk.audit_date asc, stk.id asc, e.id asc
stk.audit_date desc, stk.id desc, e.id desc
